headline: Reece James
body: 🚨 “It’s ok; I’m feeling good” - Reece James comments on recovery from hamstring injury in mixed zone after England 2-1 CongoDR. 26yo CFC right-back aiming to be available for Sunday’s FIFAWorldCup last-16 tie v Mexico at Estadio Azteca TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7408485… Video
